census.title: Inpatient Census
census.subtitle: Complete registry of all currently admitted patients.

workflow.title: IPD Workflow
workflow.subtitle: 10 Stations — inpatient journey
workflow.footnote: Station 1 — Admit order: Doctor creates the admission → Station 2 (Cashier deposit) before bed assignment · Station 3 (ADT) assigns ward & bed → nursing baseline, ward rounds, orders, then Stations 8–10 clinical discharge → financial settlement → bed released.

hub.title: Hospitalization (IPD)
hub.subtitle: In-patient management — wards, surgeries, checklists, billing forecast & death registry.
hub.menu_wards_desc: Visual bed board, admit, transfer, discharge
hub.menu_handover_desc: I-SBARR shift reports, treatments given, doctor submission
hub.menu_supply_desc: Nursing station requests for drugs and ward materials

wards.title: IPD Ward Board
wards.subtitle: Bed map & ADT —
wards.no_wards: No wards configured yet. Use Manage beds to add a ward.
wards.click_manage: Click to add or remove beds

pages.ward_rounds_sub: Clinical notes for all admitted patients
pages.doctor_only_dc: Only the admitting doctor can sign clinical discharge.

treatment.add_rx_hint: Select a medication from inventory or enter a custom drug. Dose slots are generated automatically for nurses.
treatment.custom_drug_field_ph: Drug name if not in hospital inventory
treatment.custom_drug_field_hint: Use when the medication is not stocked or a different formulation is prescribed.
treatment.no_active: No active treatment. Start one after diagnosis.
treatment.admin_protocol_hint: Each scheduled dose for this treatment. Green = given, red = missed/refused, amber = pending.
treatment.protocol_intro: Optional checkboxes mark lines you have reviewed — not required. Click a row to reschedule, comment, or remove a pending dose.
treatment.protocol_intro_rx: Select a dose line to edit that administration or switch to the Prescription tab to modify the full Rx (dosage, frequency, duration).
treatment.select_rx_hint: Select a prescription line to edit dosage, frequency, duration, or replace the drug.
treatment.select_rx_list_hint: Click a prescription to open the edit panel on the right.
treatment.doctor_comment_ph: Clinical note for this dose (visible to nursing team)…
treatment.delete_line_confirm: Remove this scheduled dose? Only pending doses can be deleted.
treatment.select_line_hint: Select a dose line to view details, add a comment, or edit the schedule.
treatment.select_to_edit: Select a pending line to edit.
treatment.line_locked_given: This dose was already administered — read only.
treatment.line_locked_missed: This dose was marked missed — read only.
treatment.protocol_intro_nurse: Select a pending dose, add an optional comment, then confirm administration. Confirmed doses turn green and cannot be unmarked. Use “Correct entry” to fix mistakes (audited).
treatment.select_line_hint_nurse: Select a dose line to administer, mark missed, or correct a given dose.
treatment.select_pending_nurse: Select a pending dose line to administer.
treatment.confirm_administer_confirm: Confirm this dose was given to the patient? This cannot be undone.
treatment.correct_entry_hint: Use only to fix documentation errors. All changes are recorded in the audit trail.
treatment.correction_reason_ph: Explain what was wrong and what you corrected…
treatment.delete_rx_confirm: Remove this prescription? Only allowed before any dose is given.
treatment.replace_hint: Replaces remaining doses. Already-given doses are kept in the audit trail.
treatment.terminate_confirm: Terminate this treatment? Nurses will no longer be able to administer pending doses.
treatment.no_active_chart: No active treatment for this admission.
treatment.no_doses_window: No doses due in the current window (±12h / +24h).

charge_modal.title: Add Charge
charge_modal.intro: Pick a Service Catalog section and line, choose Pharmacy to bill a medication from inventory (with search), or Miscellaneous for a custom line.
charge_modal.desc_ph: Set from catalog or type for miscellaneous
charge_modal.clinical_intro: Clinical / dispensing instructions — same fields as Add Prescription on IPD treatment (shown for Pharmacy charges only).
charge_modal.custom_price_hint: Custom drugs are billed at zero until pharmacy sets a price.
charge_modal.no_services_section: No active services in this section. Add them under Service Catalog.
charge_modal.select_medication_text: Use the search box to find and select a medication from inventory.
charge_modal.select_catalog_text: Pick a catalog item for this section, or add new services under Service Catalog.
charge_modal.meds_hint: {{count}} medication(s) from pharmacy — list below; type to narrow down
charge_modal.no_inventory_items: No inventory items. Add SKUs under Inventory.
charge_modal.desc_required_text: Enter a short description for this miscellaneous charge.

forecast_card.title: Invoice forecast
forecast_card.no_charges_hint: No itemized charges yet. Total uses the admission running bill and deposit.

modals.select_bed_hint: Pick a bed from the list, or click an available bed on the ward board.
modals.hospitalisation_fee_hint: Enter the HOS payment code from Cashier for the hospitalisation fee before assigning a bed.
modals.pay_later_hint: Waive payment validation now — collect hospitalisation fee at Cashier before discharge.
modals.patient_code_mismatch: This payment code belongs to a different patient.
modals.pay_later_select_patient: Search and select the patient to admit — hospitalisation fee can be collected at Cashier later.
modals.code_validated: Payment code validated. Patient details loaded — confirm to admit to this bed.
modals.clinical_dc_hint: Mark patient clinically discharged — bed moves to awaiting financial settlement.
modals.ipd_code_hint: Enter the IPD payment code from Cashier, validate, then confirm discharge.
modals.ipd_code_enter: Enter IPD payment code from Cashier, then validate.
modals.settle_hint: Verify the bill, collect balance due, then confirm. An IPD-YYYY-NNNNNNN code is generated for ward release.
modals.zero_balance: Balance is zero — confirm to generate the discharge code.

admit_request.title: IPD Admission Order
admit_request.subtitle: Patient requires hospitalization — issue formal admit order.
admit_request.diagnosis_ph: Primary diagnosis or clinical reason requiring hospitalization (e.g. Severe malaria with complications, Post-op monitoring…)
admit_request.notes_ph: Discharge plan outline, special nursing requirements, dietary restrictions, specialist referrals…
admit_request.what_next: What happens next: Cashier collects admission deposit (Station 2), then ADT assigns a bed (Station 3). The patient is formally admitted and a running bill tab is opened.
admit_request.no_beds: No beds available at this time.

messages.title: Doctor ↔ nursing messages (this admission)
messages.placeholder: Type a message to the doctor…

handover.title: Nurse shift handover report
handover.board_subtitle: I-SBARR structured shift reports — review treatments given, patient status, and hand off to the incoming nurse. Submitted reports are sent to the attending doctor and locked until recalled for audited corrections.
handover.treatments_hint: Auto-loaded from the drug chart — administered, missed, and pending doses.
handover.no_doses_shift: No dose activity recorded for this shift window.
handover.field_situation_hint: What is happening right now? Ward round findings, acute changes, monitoring.
handover.field_background_hint: Treatments given, procedures done, intake/output, key events this shift.
handover.field_assessment_hint: Your nursing assessment, concerns, trends, response to treatment.
handover.field_recommendation_hint: What the incoming nurse should continue, monitor, or escalate.
handover.field_not_done_hint: Tasks, medications, or orders not yet done and why.
handover.corrections_audited: All corrections are recorded in the audit trail.
handover.read_only: This report is locked. Only the authoring nurse may recall it for corrections.
handover.submit_hint: Locks this report, notifies the doctor, and opens a new report for the incoming nurse.
handover.readback_ph: Key priorities, safety concerns, pending orders, family updates…
handover.notify_doctor: Send report summary to attending doctor
handover.recall_hint: Reopens this report for editing. All changes will be audited.
handover.no_open_report: No shift report available for this admission.
handover.no_patients: No occupied beds — nothing to hand over.

supply.title: Nursing station request
supply.subtitle: Request drugs and materials from pharmacy to start or continue patient treatment. Pharmacy prepares and hands over items — track status here.
supply.lines_hint: Pick items from pharmacy stock. Quantity and remarks per line.
supply.no_stock_body: Ask pharmacy to add items in
